Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

96 
FINL_STD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Final Standard Payment Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This amount further adjusts the standard Medicare Payment amount (field called 
PPS_STD_VAL_PMT_AMT) by applying additional standardization requirements (e.g., sequestration). 
SHORT NAME: FINL_STD_AMT 
LONG NAME: FINL_STD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This amount is never used for payments. It
